content.en:
"Endless Lord, Hengsha Blood Hoof Liquid and Enlightenment Void Liquid have all been sent!"

Lord Xinyang took out a bottle, this bottle belongs to the supreme treasure, but compared to the value of the two treasures inside, it is not worth mentioning.

Therefore, this bottle is considered a gift

Ye Tian immediately took out the card of the Time Chamber of Commerce and asked the Time Merchant to swipe away the 500 billion time coins on it~.

In this way, the transaction is completed.

These two treasures also fell into Ye Tian's hands, and they belonged to him completely.

"Endless Lord, what other treasures do you need to buy?"

Lord Xinyang asked.

"No, just buy these two for now!

Ye Tian said.

Subsequently, Ye Tian left the Time Trading House with these two treasures.

There is no holy place.

Ye Tian first took out the Enlightenment Void Liquid, this resource can greatly improve his Will Rule Heaven and Earth, and can even raise his Will Rule Heaven and Earth to the limit that can be reached beyond the Transcendence Realm, after all, his Will Rule Heaven and Earth are already very strong, so with this resource, he can be raised to this level.

"Let's refine!"

Ye Tian swallowed the Enlightenment Void Liquid in one gulp, and his entire body was suddenly in a special state.

This moment.

Ye Tian's comprehension has improved a lot, and his perception of the Heaven and Earth of Will Rules is constantly improving, and even his will power is improving.

His willpower had reached the sixth order, but after reaching the sixth order of eternal will, it was difficult to continue to improve.

In these years, Ye Tian's sixth-order will was in the early stage of the sixth-order eternal will, and he had never been promoted to the middle stage of the sixth-order.

But now that the help of the Enlightenment Void Liquid is only incidental ascension, the Eternal Will actually has a tendency to be elevated to the middle of the sixth order.

Day by day, Ye Tian continued to refine the energy of the Enlightenment Void Liquid,

Whether it is his will or his perception of heaven and earth, it is skyrocketing.

In a flash, a long time passed.

And this Enlightenment Void Liquid was finally completely refined by Ye Tian.

"The Eternal Will has reached the middle of the Sixth Order, which is not bad. "

"The rules of the will, the heaven and the earth, have also grown to the limit, and there is no way to continue to improve. "

"Even his own comprehension has improved slightly, and it is worthy of being one of the most suitable treasures for the Legendary Lord of the Transcendence Realm. "

Fierce is very excited, this treasure is too cost-effective, no wonder it will be expensive.

In terms of time, the business house can be exchanged for other forces, and Genmu can't take it out.

"Next, let's refine the Hengsha Blood Hoof Liquid, this resource can improve the refining of the Legendary Body, even if it has a huge effect on my Supreme Legendary Body. "

"Once my Supreme Legendary Body is raised to the limit, I can let my body merge with the Will Rule Heaven and Earth, and once I initially fuse the Heaven and Earth, I can be regarded as the Peak Transcendent Realm Legendary Lord. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he began to take Hengsha Blood Hoof Fluid

Hengsha Blood Hoof Fluid is not directly oralized, but smeared on the inside of the body, and directly absorbs Hengsha Blood Hoof Fluid with the body, so as to quench the Supreme Legend Body and make the Supreme Legend Body continue to progress.

Soon.

Ye Tian began to cultivate like this.

However, Ye Tian underestimated the difficulty of cultivating the Supreme Legendary Body, and after cultivating for a period of time, he estimated that this Hengsha Blood Hoof Liquid would not be able to make his Supreme Legendary Body cultivate to the limit.

"It is worthy of the supreme legendary body, it consumes too many resources, and even the blood hooves of Hengsha are not enough. "

Ye Tian said helplessly.

However, this is also a good thing, which shows that the Supreme Legendary Body is extremely powerful, and once he cultivates to the extreme, his strength will also improve a lot, far from being comparable to other Legendary Body.

In the blink of an eye, a long time has passed.

On this day, Ye Tian completely exhausted the energy of this Hengsha blood hoof liquid.

"I have to buy another Hengsha blood hoof liquid 100 million"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Fortunately, the Time Merchant is not just a Hengsha Blood Hoof Liquid, but he is not enough time coins in the Time Firm

So, he sold some of the resources to the Time Firm, and then bought another Hengsha Blood Hoof Liquid from the Time Firm.

"The second part, I hope that this time I can directly cultivate the Supreme Legendary Body to the current limit. "

Ye Tian said expectantly.

Immediately, he directly used this Hengsha Blood Hoof Fluid and began to cultivate again.

Time passed slowly, and unconsciously, Ye Tian's Supreme Legendary Body was getting closer and closer to its current limit.

Finally, when the blood hoof fluid of Hengsha was about to run out, the Supreme Legendary Body reached the limit of the Legendary Lord of the Transcendental Realm.

"It's done!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

In the following years, he only needs to do one thing, that is, his body merges with heaven and earth, once he completes the initial fusion of his body and the will rule heaven and earth, even if he has stepped into the realm of the peak transcendent realm legendary lord.

And his retreat and penance this time can be regarded as coming to an end.

Ye Tian had already cultivated the Will Rule Heaven and Earth and the Supreme Legendary Body to the limit, plus he controlled time.To a certain extent, his own realm was high, so it was nothing to him who fused Heaven and Earth.

In a flash, millions of eternal years have passed.

Airplanes!!!

Ye Tian's body gradually merged with the Heaven and Earth of Will Rules, as if the Heaven and Earth of Will Rules poured into the body, and the body seemed to be a heaven and earth of its own, and it could even be said that the body gradually became a part of the heaven and earth.

...... コ0

Why is it difficult to kill half-step Legendary Realm Lords.Because their bodies are completely fused with heaven and earth, they are the embodiment of heaven and earth, and to kill a half-step Legendary Realm lord, they need to break the limit of heaven and earth and then shatter heaven and earth.

Therefore, it is so difficult for the half-step Legendary Realm to kill the half-step Legendary Realm Lord.

And he was able to kill a half-step Legendary Realm Lord before, because he controlled the supreme skill of Time Dripping, directly shattered that piece of heaven and earth, and bombarded the half-step Legendary Realm Lord.

"Initially fusing the Heaven and Earth of Will Rules, I can be regarded as a Legendary Lord who has reached the peak of the Transcendence Realm. "

Ye Tian said with a smile.

This is thanks to that Enlightenment Void Liquid, plus two points of Hengsha Blood Hoof Liquid, it cost a full 800 billion time coins, even if it is a half-step Legendary Realm lord, few people can get so many time coins, unless it is bankrupt.

Now, Ye Tian has paid so much time coins, and the improvement of his strength is completely worth it, saving countless eternal years of penance.

Otherwise, if he wanted to become the Peak Transcendent Legendary Lord, it would take at least a billion eternal years.This is not a joke, but it is true, because cultivating the Supreme Legendary Body is too time-consuming.

"With my current strength, even if I kill a top-notch half-step Legendary Realm Lord, there is a great hope. "

Ye Tian was full of confidence. _
